sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Co. to celebrate grand opening of new Roseburg store March 28
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company will hold the grand opening of its new Roseburg store on Saturday, March 28, 2026. The event, from 10 a.m. to 2 p.m. at 1350 NE Stephens St. STE 50, will feature appearances and activities from Douglas County 4-H, a face painter, and free coffee, cookies, and donuts from local vendors. This celebration marks a new shopping destination for rural and farm supplies in the Roseburg area.

feed.title: CSX.com - How CSX Mechanical Teams Spot Issues Before They Affect Safety or Service
feed.summary: CSX utilizes a combination of visual inspections, advanced technology like wayside detectors, and magnetic particle testing in mechanical shops to proactively identify railcar issues. These comprehensive inspection methods aim to detect defects and hairline cracks before they can compromise safety or service. The process is crucial for protecting employees, operations, and communities by addressing potential risks early.

feed.title: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN) March 2026
feed.summary: Citigroup has maintained its "Buy" rating on Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN) as of March 17, 2026, citing continued improvements in delivery efficiency. The firm's analysis did not include a new price target, and the stock saw a -3.7% price movement since this affirmation. Meyka AI gives AMZN a B+ grade, supporting the consensus view but noting that the maintained rating does not materially alter its assessment.

feed.title: State Street Group Ceases to Be Substantial Holder in PWR Holdings
feed.summary: State Street Corporation and its subsidiaries have ceased to be a substantial shareholder in PWR Holdings (AU:PWH) as of March 20, 2026. This change signifies a major institutional investor has reduced its holding below the substantial shareholder threshold, potentially impacting PWR's shareholder profile and market perception. The most recent analyst rating on PWH stock is a Hold with a A$9.00 price target.

feed.title: Intuit Inc. stock faces pressure amid slowing QuickBooks growth and rising AI competition in SMB software market
feed.summary: Intuit Inc. reported softer-than-expected subscription growth in its core QuickBooks segment for fiscal Q2 2027, leading to a sharp drop in stock price. The slowdown is attributed to macroeconomic headwinds affecting small businesses and intensified AI competition. Despite strong performance from TurboTax and Credit Karma, the company projects lower full-year revenue growth, impacting investor expectations.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial (SYF) Credit Trends Reinforce Analyst Optimism
feed.summary: BTIG analyst Vincent Caintic reaffirmed a Buy rating and a $96 price target on Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) after reviewing the company’s February 2026 credit card data. The analyst lowered his Q1 2026 net charge-off rate estimate due to better-than-seasonal performance in net charge-offs and delinquencies, and noted positive discretionary spending trends. While loan growth estimates were revised down, the overall credit trends reinforce optimism for Synchrony Financial's performance.

feed.title: Emerson's HQ campus north of Austin listed for sale
feed.summary: Emerson's headquarters campus in Round Rock, just north of Austin, has been listed for sale as the automation company plans to consolidate its local real estate presence in Austin. This move signifies that Round Rock will lose one of its major employers. The article highlights other related commercial real estate developments in the Central Texas area.

feed.title: Copart Inc. stock faces valuation scrutiny amid slowing auction growth and rising competition pressu
feed.summary: Copart Inc. (ISIN: US2172041061), a leading online vehicle auction platform, is confronting slowing revenue growth and increased competition from rivals like IAA and Ritchie Bros., forming RB Global. The company's premium valuation is under scrutiny as its core online vehicle auction business experiences softer volumes and international expansion faces hurdles. Despite a strong financial position, investors are assessing whether Copart can maintain its high-margin model in a maturing market with normalizing used car prices and evolving insurer behaviors.

feed.title: Cisco Systems Inc. stock faces pressure amid shifting networking demand and AI infrastructure buildo
feed.summary: Cisco Systems Inc. is navigating a complex market driven by AI infrastructure demands,

feed.title: Dollar General names JJ Fleeman Jr. as next CEO
feed.summary: Dollar General has announced that JJ Fleeman Jr. will take over as the new CEO, succeeding Todd Vasos after his decade of leadership. This transition places Fleeman at the helm of Nashville's second-largest public company. The article also touches on related company news like HQ expansion, store closures, and recent layoffs.

feed.title: News Corp (Class A) stock faces uncertainty amid shifting media landscape and digital transition pre
feed.summary: News Corp (Class A) is navigating challenges in traditional publishing by expanding its digital assets, particularly in real estate platforms like realestate.com.au. The company is balancing legacy print operations with new revenue streams, including premium news brands like Dow Jones and The Wall Street Journal, and its book publishing arm, HarperCollins. Investors are focused on News Corp's strategic diversification and financial health amidst a volatile media environment and competitive pressures.

feed.title: Western Digital (WDC) sales chief settles RSU vesting taxes with withheld shares
feed.summary: Western Digital's Chief Sales & Marketing Officer, Brian Scott Davis, performed routine equity compensation activities related to restricted stock unit vesting. He exercised dividend equivalent rights into common shares and had 961 common shares withheld at $293.10 each to cover tax obligations. These transactions were for compensation and tax purposes, not open-market trades, and he now directly owns 115,564 common shares of WDC.

feed.title: Devon Energy Extends Revolving Credit Facility Maturity
feed.summary: Devon Energy (DVN) has extended its revolving credit facility maturity from March 24, 2030, to March 24, 2031, with options for further one-year extensions. This amendment includes removing a 10 basis point credit spread adjustment on SOFR-based borrowings, which is expected to lower borrowing costs and enhance financial flexibility. The revisions improve balance sheet resilience and reflect continued confidence in Devon's credit profile.

feed.title: Omnicom Group Inc. stock faces uncertainty amid ad industry slowdown and acquisition integration challenges
feed.summary: Omnicom Group Inc. (ISIN: US6819191064) stock is navigating a challenging advertising market marked by an industry slowdown and integration hurdles from its recent acquisition of Barron's Publisher. Despite a defensive stance through diversification and investments in AI, the company's recent quarterly results showed softer-than-expected organic revenue growth, leading to investor caution. Key factors for investors include cost discipline, dividend yield, manageable debt, and the strategic pivot towards digital and content services, though risks remain from potential recessionary pressures and integration delays.

feed.title: M-tron Industries Reports Strong Q4 2025 Results, Backlog Surges
feed.summary: M-tron Industries (MPTI) announced strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, with quarterly revenue up to $14.2 million and diluted EPS at $0.99. Full-year revenue reached $54.4 million, an 11% increase from 2024. The company's backlog surged by 61.8% to $76.4 million, driven by multi-year program wins, and a $27.5 million cash infusion through warrant exercise strengthened its balance sheet for potential acquisitions.

feed.title: Phillips 66 stock surges to 52-week high on BofA price target hike amid oil price volatility
feed.summary: Phillips 66 stock surged over 4% to a new 52-week high on March 24, 2026, driven by Bank of America raising its price target to $183 from $154, citing updated 2026 refiner models and rising oil prices due to Middle East tensions. Analysts maintain a Neutral rating but recognize the company's strong refining margins. The stock's performance reflects its resilience and favorable positioning in a volatile energy market.

feed.title: PepsiCo Inc. stock faces pressure amid shifting consumer trends and competitive landscape in 2026
feed.summary: PepsiCo Inc. is navigating challenges in 2026 due to shifting consumer preferences towards healthier options, impacting its traditional beverage volumes. While its snacks division, particularly Frito-Lay, provides stability and strong margins, the company faces pressure to innovate and adapt amidst increased competition and macroeconomic factors. US investors are watching PepsiCo's strategic responses, dividend history, and cost discipline to maintain market leadership.

feed.title: Revolut Revenue Jumps 46% to 4.5 Billion as Lending Push Accelerates
feed.summary: Revolut's revenue surged by 46% to 4.5 billion in 2025, exceeding expectations, with profit before tax rising to 1.7 billion. The company is accelerating its lending initiatives, focusing on credit cards, personal loans, and overdrafts, especially after securing a UK banking license. This strategic shift aims to reduce reliance on cryptocurrency revenue and challenge incumbent banks, while also leading to increased operational costs and plans for a US banking license.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin (LMT) Secures $478M Contract for Submarine Imaging System
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (LMT) has been awarded a significant $478.36 million contract, potentially reaching $1.19 billion, for the engineering and technical support of the Integrated Submarine Imaging System. The contract for new and existing submarines is expected to be completed by March 2036. Despite the company's strong market position and financial health indicators like a strong Altman Z-Score, it faces challenges with declining gross and operating margins and high leverage.

feed.title: No Evidence of Intentional Cause in Valero Port Arthur Refinery Explosion, Officials Say
feed.summary: Authorities have found no evidence of foul play in the recent explosion at Valero Energy Corp.'s Port Arthur, Texas refinery, according to the Jefferson County Sheriff's office. The explosion occurred in a diesel hydrotreater and was felt several miles away, but Valero reported no injuries and accounted for all personnel. Investigators are continuing to examine the cause of the incident, dispelling online rumors suggesting the explosion was in retaliation for U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran.

feed.title: PPL Targets Strong EPS Growth Through 2029
feed.summary: PPL Corp (PPL) is targeting an annual EPS growth of 6% to 8% through at least 2029, aiming to reach the upper limit of this range. Despite this promising outlook from its regulated utility operations in Pennsylvania, Kentucky, and Rhode Island, the company faces financial challenges, including a low Altman Z-Score indicating potential distress and a significant debt-to-equity ratio. Investors are advised to monitor these financial metrics carefully alongside the growth prospects.

feed.title: Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) Trading Up 2.1% - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) saw its stock rise by 2.1% on Tuesday, trading at $301.05 with lower than average volume. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus, with several firms raising price targets, and the company recently beat quarterly earnings estimates. Insider selling has occurred, but institutional ownership remains high at 92.51%.

feed.title: Centene Corp stock faces Medicaid redetermination pressures amid 2026 policy shifts
feed.summary: Centene Corp (ISIN: US15135B1017), the largest Medicaid managed care provider, is navigating membership volatility due to post-pandemic redeterminations and is bracing for new regulatory changes in 2026. The company is actively diversifying into Medicare Advantage and strengthening its commercial segments to offset these pressures. Investors are urged to monitor earnings impact, diversification efforts, and policy shifts as governmental payers constitute over 90% of Centene's premiums.

feed.title: Marcus & Millichap Capital Corp. Appoints Megan Young as Director in Fort Lauderdale
feed.summary: Marcus & Millichap Capital Corporation (MMCC) has appointed Megan Young as a director in its Fort Lauderdale office, enhancing its presence in the Southeast. Young brings over eight years of experience in commercial real estate investing, including development, sustainable construction, and AI-focused consulting, and will focus on arranging financing across various property types. This appointment supports MMCC's continued growth and strengthens its capital markets capabilities in Florida and the broader Southeast.

feed.title: DuPont de Nemours stock faces key vote on reverse split amid institutional buying and strategic shif
feed.summary: DuPont de Nemours is seeking shareholder approval for a discretionary reverse stock split (1-for-2 to 1-for-4) at its May 2026 annual meeting, aiming to boost share price and appeal. This move comes as institutional investors, like Murphy Middleton Hinkle & Parker Inc. which increased its stake by 825.6%, show strong confidence in the company. Alongside strategic divestitures, such as the $1.8 billion sale of its Aramids business, DuPont is refocusing its portfolio on electronics, healthcare, and water, with analysts projecting significant upside.

feed.title: Southland Holdings (SLND) shifts $110M term debt to sureties and gains waivers
feed.summary: Southland Holdings (SLND) has restructured approximately $110 million of its term loan facilities, transferring this debt to its surety providers. The sureties have waived quarterly principal and monthly interest payments until maturity, along with existing defaults and covenant violations, in exchange for Southland agreeing to sell idle equipment and use proceeds to reduce principal. This move, while providing immediate relief, highlights the company's financial strain and reliance on its sureties for continued operations and future financing.

feed.title: LEXI Stock Price, News & Analysis | Alexis Practical Tactical ETF
feed.summary: The Alexis Practical Tactical ETF (LEXI) is an exchange-traded fund managed by Alexis Investment Partners, LLC, which trades on the Nasdaq exchange. The ETF employs a tactical allocation strategy, allowing it to adjust its exposure across various asset classes, including stocks, bonds, gold, and REITs, in response to market conditions. LEXI is benchmarked against a blend of the Morningstar Global Markets Index, S&P 500 Index, and Bloomberg US Aggregate Bond Index, and has received a 5-star Morningstar Rating in the Tactical Allocation category.

feed.title: Barings Corporate (NYSE: MCI) adviser updates notional thrift plan stake
feed.summary: Barings Corporate Investors adviser board member Roger W. Crandall filed an amended Form 4 to update his position in the Barings Non-Qualified Thrift Plan. The filing indicates a notional plan balance linked to over 345,000 underlying common shares of beneficial interest, with no buy or sell transactions reported. This plan is fully notional, meaning it does not represent direct ownership of securities and is exercisable only upon specific events like termination or retirement.

feed.title: Ross Stores Inc. stock faces retail sector headwinds amid shifting consumer spending patterns in 202
feed.summary: Ross Stores Inc. is navigating significant retail sector headwinds due to shifting consumer spending patterns and a high-interest-rate environment, despite its off-price model's resilience. The company continues to prioritize store expansion and operational efficiency, aiming to open over 100 new stores annually while maintaining a strong balance sheet and leveraging opportunistic buying. Investors are monitoring upcoming earnings for insights into discretionary spending and the company's ability to sustain growth amidst competitive and economic pressures, though its historical performance in downturns suggests robust stability.

feed.title: Weak two-year note auction reflects a 'bunker mentality' right now, says Wells Fargo's Schumacher
feed.summary: Michael Schumacher of Wells Fargo stated on "Fast Money" that the weak two-year note auction indicates a "bunker mentality" in the market. He warned that the current bond market troubles could soon extend to the stock market. The article highlights immediate concerns about spillover effects from fixed income to equities.

feed.title: Linde plc stock surges on helium demand boom from semiconductors and major fund buying
feed.summary: Linde plc is experiencing a stock surge due to sky-rocketing demand for electronic-grade helium in the semiconductor industry, driven by AI expansion and high-tech manufacturing. Major funds are increasing their stakes in the company, confident in its robust 2026 EPS guidance and a project backlog exceeding $10 billion, including clean energy initiatives. US investors are particularly drawn to Linde's direct NYSE access, enabling exposure to resilient supply chains and AI infrastructure without ADR complications.

feed.title: The Case for Darden Restaurants (DRI) Gets Stronger
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants (DRI) is showing strengthening performance, leading analysts to raise price targets and maintain positive ratings. Following its Q3 FY 2026 results, BofA increased its price target to $272, citing improved sales projections and lower commodity inflation, while Bernstein expects a nearly 3.5% price rise with minimal impact on traffic, especially for LongHorn. Despite this, the article suggests that some AI stocks might offer greater returns in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: FERC sets new ROE for New England transmission owners, PPL evaluates response
feed.summary: The Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) has issued Opinion No. 594, setting a new methodology for determining the return on equity (ROE) for New England transmission owners (NETOs), including a base ROE of 9.57% and a maximum of 12.09% with incentives. This decision is retroactive to October 16, 2014, and requires refunds. PPL Corporation, whose subsidiary Rhode Island Energy is affected, is reviewing the order but does not expect a material impact on its operations or financial condition, reaffirming its 2026 forecast and long-term growth targets.

feed.title: Trimble senior vice president Peter Large announces retirement effective May
feed.summary: Peter Large, Trimble's Senior Vice President overseeing Strategy, Corporate Development, Corporate Partnerships and Alliances, and the Office of Technology Innovation, announced his retirement effective late May 2026. His decision was not due to disagreements with the company and he will not receive severance, but his retirement qualifies under Trimble's Age & Service Equity Vesting Program. This news follows a strong Q4 2025 for Trimble, with earnings surpassing analyst expectations, and positive analyst ratings from Bernstein SocGen Group and Oppenheimer.

feed.title: Assessing Becton Dickinson (BDX) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Business Separation Plans
feed.summary: Becton Dickinson (BDX) has seen its share price decline by approximately 16% over the past month and 20% in the last three months, trading at $156.23. Despite this weakness, a common narrative suggests the stock is undervalued with a fair value of $197.15, supported by the anticipated separation of its Biosciences and Diagnostic Solutions business, expected to improve cash flow and margins. However, investors are advised to consider potential risks like trade headwinds and the complexity of the business separation before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines (LUV) EVP reports routine tax-withholding share disposition
feed.summary: Anthony Roach, EVP Customer & Brand at Southwest Airlines (LUV), reported a routine tax-related share disposition. He had 2,179 shares withheld at $39.41 per share to cover tax obligations, a non-market transaction. Following this event, Roach directly holds 63,672.543 shares and indirectly holds 79 shares through a Retirement Savings Plan.

feed.title: MIAX (MIAX) EVP Shelly Brown sells 25,932 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Shelly Brown, EVP and Chief Strategy Officer of MIAMI INTERNATIONAL HOLDINGS, INC. (MIAX), sold 25,932 shares of common stock in an open-market transaction. The sale, executed at a weighted average price of $39.33 per share, was conducted under a pre-scheduled Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in December 2025. Following the transaction, Brown directly holds 299,197 MIAX shares.

feed.title: -Valero shuts Texas refinery after explosion, sources say
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corp has temporarily shut down its 380,000-barrel-per-day Port Arthur, Texas refinery following an explosion and fire in a diesel hydrotreater unit. No injuries were reported from the incident, which occurred on Monday night. The cause of the explosion is unknown, but authorities do not believe it was a deliberate act.

feed.title: LSI Industries Closes Royston Acquisition and New Credit Facility
feed.summary: LSI Industries (LYTS) has successfully closed its acquisition of Royston for $325 million and secured a new senior credit facility of up to $350 million. This strategic move aims to expand LSI's integrated retail-branding platform, bolstering its Display Solutions segment and positioning it as a comprehensive provider for North American retail build-out projects. Analysts currently rate LYTS as a Buy with a $30.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, also rates it as Outperform, driven by strong fundamentals and a positive earnings outlook.

feed.title: M-Tron Industries Inc - Q4 2025 revenues were $14.2 million - SEC filing
feed.summary: M-Tron Industries Inc. reported Q4 2025 revenues of $14.2 million, according to an SEC filing. This information was published on March 24, 2026, and is part of the company's financial updates. The full article content is reserved for members.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines (LUV) CFO uses 11,447 shares for tax withholding
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines EVP and CFO Tom Doxey reported a routine tax-related disposition of 11,447 shares of Southwest common stock. These shares were withheld at $39.41 per share to cover tax obligations, not sold in an open-market transaction. Following this transaction, Doxey directly holds 104,800 shares of the company's stock.

feed.title: KD Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit Filed by The Rosen Law Firm
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is reminding investors who purchased Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: KD) securities between August 7, 2024, and February 9, 2026, of the April 13, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline for a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Kyndryl made false and misleading statements about its financial condition and internal controls, leading to investor damages. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to contact The Rosen Law Firm to learn more about joining the class action.

feed.title: M-Tron Industries Inc - Q4 2025 Revenues Were $14.2 Million - SEC Filing
feed.summary: M-Tron Industries Inc. reported its Q4 2025 revenues were $14.2 million, as detailed in an SEC filing. This information was sourced from Refinitiv and highlighted by TradingView News.

feed.title: Devon Energy Extends Credit Facility to 2031 and Removes 10 bps SOFR Spread
feed.summary: Devon Energy (DVN) has amended its credit agreement to extend the maturity of its revolving credit facility until March 24, 2031. This amendment also renews options for further one-year extensions and removes a 10 basis point credit spread adjustment to SOFR-based rates. The company anticipates these changes will improve its liquidity and reduce interest expenses.

feed.title: Devon Energy Corp - Enters First Amendment To Credit Agreement On March 24, 2026 - SEC Filing
feed.summary: Devon Energy Corp announced it entered into a First Amendment to its Credit Agreement on March 24, 2026, as detailed in an SEC filing. This update was reported by Refinitiv and Reuters.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark Corp stock faces mixed institutional moves amid high dividend yield and analyst Hold
feed.summary: Institutional investors are exhibiting mixed movements in Kimberly-Clark Corp stock, with some increasing stakes while others trim positions. Despite a cautious "Hold" rating from analysts, the stock offers an attractive 5.1% annualized dividend yield, drawing income-focused investors. The company's recent earnings beat on EPS but missed revenue expectations, and a high debt-to-equity ratio alongside market competition present potential risks.

feed.title: Seagate (STX) jumps as bullish analyst target hikes and strong AI-storage outlook keep momentum intact
feed.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings plc (STX) stock rose by 6.9% due to continued bullish sentiment, strong recent results, and an optimistic March-quarter outlook. Analyst price targets have increased, driven by anticipated AI/data-center storage demand and the company's HAMR technology ramp. Insider trading shows 141 sales by executives and no purchases in the last six months, while institutional investors have both added and decreased positions.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. (Class C) stock slides over 1.5% amid tech sector pressure and geopolitical tensions
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. (Class C) stock, ticker GOOG, fell over 1.5% in early Nasdaq trading on March 24, 2026, dropping to around $293 amid broader tech sector weakness driven by Middle East geopolitical tensions and rising oil prices. Despite this short-term pullback, analysts remain strongly bullish on Alphabet, with 86% rating it a "Buy" due to its AI monetization and cloud growth fundamentals. For US investors, the dip is seen as a potential accumulation opportunity, underpinned by strong long-term prospects and analyst consensus.

feed.title: M-tron Industries (NYSE: MPTI) posts strong 2025 growth and backlog surge
feed.summary: M-tron Industries (NYSE: MPTI) reported strong financial results for full fiscal year 2025, with revenues up 11.0% to $54.4 million and net income rising to $8.4 million. The company's backlog surged by 61.9% to $76.4 million, driven by multi-year program wins in defense and avionics extending through 2028. Additionally, warrant exercises generated approximately $27.5 million in cash, strengthening the balance sheet for future strategic acquisitions.

feed.title: Ross Stores (NASDAQ: ROST) CEO receives 54,901-share award with tax withholding
feed.summary: Ross Stores (NASDAQ: ROST) CEO James Grant Conroy received a grant of 54,901 shares of common stock as part of a performance award on March 20, 2026. A total of 8,268 shares were withheld to cover tax obligations, resulting in him directly holding 224,926 shares. The filing also details 51,164 performance-based restricted stock units (PRSUs) with vesting schedules extending through March 2028.
